positive: A vibrant, stylized cosmic sloth lounging on a stack of glowing geometric planets. The sloth has a dreamy, tranquil expression, surrounded by floating nebula gas and stylized celestial flora. The style is highly detailed digital illustration, inspired by Art Nouveau meets modern sci-fi vaporwave. Use thick, clean black outlines and a limited, saturated color palette: deep blues, electric purples, neon pinks, and emerald greens. Central composition, perfect symmetry, minimal background clutter, designed for high contrast textile printing. Rule of thirds applied to the arrangement of planets and nebulae. Overhead, soft directional studio lighting highlighting the glossy textures of the sloth and planets.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor quality, noise, low detail, photographic, realism, messy, grunge, dirty
